title: AI Stained Glass
description: Turns the photo into a colorful medieval gothic stained glass window.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a medieval gothic cathedral stained glass window art piece. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identities, key facial features, pose, camera angle, and main composition. The entire image must be composed of vibrant, semi-translucent colored glass segments partitioned by thick, dark lead outlines. Have soft glowing light filtering through the colorful glass panes from behind. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, photographic look, brushstrokes, oil painting, reality, smooth gradients, 3D shading, bad anatomy, malformed hands, distorted faces, low quality, blurry, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, extra people, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. cathedral window style, rose window colors...
